import SectionHeader from './SectionHeader'; const skills = [ { icon: '🔐', name: 'Cybersecurity & Awareness' }, { icon: '🎮', name: 'Game Modding & Engine Work' }, { icon: '🤖', name: 'AI & Prompt Engineering' }, { icon: '📊', name: 'Data Analytics' }, { icon: '📣', name: 'Digital Marketing' }, { icon: '💾', name: 'C++ Programming' }, { icon: '🗄️', name: 'Database Design (MS Access)' }, { icon: '🌐', name: 'AR / EN Translation' }, ]; export default function About() { return (

I'm a 4th-year Management Information Systems student at Sadat Academy for Management Sciences, graduating in 2026. I sit at the crossroads of technology, security, and creativity.

My passion for Cybersecurity drives me to understand how systems break — and how to protect them. My love for Game Modding showed me that any system can be rebuilt from scratch with the right vision.

Certified by Harvard, Microsoft, Google, IBM, Meta, and the Dubai Future Foundation — always learning and pushing forward.

🏅 National Scout Excellence Champion — 1st Place (2020)
{skills.map(s => (
{s.icon} {s.name}
))}
); }
